name: Libromancer Realized
name_jp: リブロマンサー・リアライズ
desc: You can reveal 1 "Libromancer" Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon 1 "Fire Token" (Cyberse/FIRE/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level as the revealed monster. While you control that Token, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "Libromancer" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Libromancer Realized" once per turn.
eff: You can reveal 1 "Libromancer" Ritual Monster in your hand: Special Summon 1 "Fire Token" (Cyberse/FIRE/ATK 0/DEF 0) with the same Level as the revealed monster. While you control that Token, you cannot Special Summon monsters, except "Libromancer" monsters. You can only use this effect of "Libromancer Realized" once per turn.

sets.set: 25th Anniversary Tin: Dueling Heroes Mega Pack

summoning: Restricts the player's Special Summons to archetype specific monsters
